creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
Here's a patch with the latest version of Inliner.

diff -Nru p5-CSS-Inliner/Makefile p5-CSS-Inliner.new/Makefile
--- p5-CSS-Inliner/Makefile	2011-06-20 13:33:08.000000000 -0400
+++ p5-CSS-Inliner.new/Makefile	2011-07-12 13:27:39.194899549 -0400
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=	CSS-Inliner
-PORTVERSION=	3275
+PORTVERSION=	3295
 CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
@@ -14,8 +14,7 @@
 MAINTAINER=	vivek@khera.org
 COMMENT=	Library for converting CSS blocks and files to inline styles

-RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-CSS-Simple>=3211:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-CSS-Simple \
-		p5-HTML-Query>=0.07:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-HTML-Query \
+RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-HTML-Query>=0.07:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-HTML-Query \
 		p5-HTML-Tree>=3.23:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-HTML-Tree \
 		p5-libwww>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww \
 		p5-URI>=0:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-URI
@@ -25,9 +24,12 @@

 PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes

-MAN3=		CSS::Inliner.3
+MAN3=		CSS::Inliner.3 CSS::Inliner::Parser.3
 PLIST_FILES=	%%SITE_PERL%%/CSS/Inliner.pm \
+		%%SITE_PERL%%/CSS/Inliner/Parser.pm \
 		%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/CSS/Inliner/.packlist
-PLIST_DIRS=	%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/CSS/Inliner
+PLIST_DIRS=	%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/CSS/Inliner \
+		%%SITE_PERL%%/CSS/Inliner
+PLIST_DIRSTRY=	%%SITE_PERL%%/CSS

 .include <bsd.port.mk>
diff -Nru p5-CSS-Inliner/distinfo p5-CSS-Inliner.new/distinfo
--- p5-CSS-Inliner/distinfo	2011-06-20 13:33:08.000000000 -0400
+++ p5-CSS-Inliner.new/distinfo	2011-07-12 11:15:17.323614332 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (CSS-Inliner-3275.tar.gz) =
07a41c21c866f649713458c07ee2746e1cea71e95ac24c0ce3a3a2df172910e8
-SIZE (CSS-Inliner-3275.tar.gz) = 15629
+SHA256 (CSS-Inliner-3295.tar.gz) =
8bb234f3546b41549ca4b8e7cbbad855322dac27548ec0e6abd7d1096980646f
+SIZE (CSS-Inliner-3295.tar.gz) = 19128
